testcase.name: shutdown

failure.message: Expected `study.current.variables$objects.found` to have the same values as `expected.variables`. ('test-smk_dgr-ds.recodeValues-factor_missing.R:259:5')

testcase.failure: Expected `study.current.variables$objects.found` to have the same values as `expected.variables`. Actual: "D", "odf_1", "odf_2", "odf_3", "PM_BMI_CATEGORICAL" Expected: "D", "PM_BMI_CATEGORICAL", "odf_1", "ndf_1", "odf_2", "ndf_2", "odf_3", "ndf_3" Absent: "ndf_1", "ndf_2", "ndf_3" Backtrace: x 1. \-global ds_expect_variables(...) at test-smk_dgr-ds.recodeValues-factor_missing.R:259:5 2. \-testthat::expect_setequal(...)
